code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1_opt = io.read_line()
  let line1 = match line1_opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let line2_opt = io.read_line()
  let line2 = match line2_opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let target_opt = string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  let target = match target_opt
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let part_opt = parts.get(i)
    match part_opt
    when Some(sv)
      let n_opt = string.parse_int(sv)
      match n_opt
      when Some(n)
        nums = list.push(nums, n)
      when None
      end
    when None
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = nums.len() - 1
  mut result = -1
  while lo <= hi and result < 0
    let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    let v_opt = nums.get(mid)
    match v_opt
    when Some(v)
      if v == target
        result = mid
      else if v < target
        lo = mid + 1
      else
        hi = mid - 1
      end
    when None
      lo = hi + 1
    end
  end

  if result >= 0
    print("index=#{result}")
  else
    print("not_found")
  end
end
